top.title: Zelensky in Downing Street for Ukraine war talks with European leaders
top.summary: Zelensky's meeting with Ukraine's staunchest European allies comes as US President Donald Trump's focus has shifted to the war with Iran.

top.title: Armenia votes as Russia piles pressure on pro-West government
top.summary: Incumbent Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan is seeking a third term despite falling domestic support.

top.title: Eriksen conscious after collapsing in Denmark game
top.summary: Christian Eriksen collapsed during Denmark's friendly against Ukraine but is now conscious, says the Danish Football Association.

top.title: The gamers taking on the industry to stop it switching off games
top.summary: Stop Killing Games is challenging the idea publishers can shut down a game without making sure it's still playable.

top.title: Trump to meet AI leaders to discuss US investment in their companies
top.summary: The US president said on Friday he expects to meet the leaders of top AI companies next week.

top.title: Raspberry Pi raises profit forecast as AI demand grows
top.summary: The firm said it expected to deliver adjusted earnings of at least $38m (£28.2m) for the first half of 2026.
